title: R5: value additional types
description: R5: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value[x]` additional types (boolean, Quantity, Range, Reference)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value[x]` 1..1 `boolean, CodeableConcept, Quantity, Range, Reference`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value[x]` 1..1 `boolean, CodeableConcept, Quantity, Range, Reference`
*  R4B: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MeasureReport.group.stratifier.stratum.component.value[x]` do not cover the following types: boolean, Quantity, Range, Reference.
